name: Oak Valley Bancorp
summary: Oak Valley Bancorp is a California bank holding company and parent of Oak Valley Community Bank, a state-chartered bank founded in 1991 and headquartered in Oakdale, California. The Bank offers commercial and real estate loans, business and personal deposit accounts, SBA lending, lines of credit, online banking, mobile banking, remote deposit capture, merchant services, and wire transfers. It serves individuals and small to medium-sized businesses across California's Central Valley and Eastern Sierras through nineteen full-service branches.
